betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Nitra§f

§aRed dust dropped by mobs — craft ammo containers and healing stimpaks!§f

§bNitra§f is a red dust obtained by killing mobs with a weapon that has the §bPainsaw§f ability (chainsaw, etc.). It cannot be found naturally.

§6Production§f:
§b• Kill mobs§f with Painsaw weapons to get §bSmall Piles of Nitra§f
§b• Amount depends§f on mob max health (e.g., Iron Golem → 10 piles + 10 XP)
§b• Almost every mob§f drops at least 1 small pile
§b• Bobmazon§f: §e4§f Nitra for §e16§f caps

§6Conversion§f:
§b• §e4×§f Small Piles → §e1×§f Nitra (and vice versa)

§6Uses§f:
§b• Stimpak§f: §e3§f Small Piles + Metal Syringe → heals §e2.5§f hearts (shapeless)
§b• Ammo Container§f: §e4§f Nitra → ammo for 3 random guns

§cNote§f: Crafted ammo containers differ from found ones:
§b• Cannot§f give expensive ammo (mini nukes, .35)
§b• Blue§f color (found are green)
§b• Half§f as much ammo as regular containers

§eTip§f: Farm §bNitra§f by killing passive mobs with an §bElectric Chainsaw§f. Set up a mob farm with Painsaw weapons for continuous nitra income!
